name: Edo Tensei Nagato (S)
pageTitle: Edo Tensei Nagato (S) - Naruto Arena Classic
description: Edo Tensei Nagato (S) has been summoned to do battle. He is fully aware of the fact that he is being controlled again as he was while he was living.

skills.name: Human Path
skills.description: Nagato draws out the lifeforce of an enemy, stealing 10 health and dealing 20 damage. That enemy will be stunned for 1 turn.

skills.name: Preta Path
skills.description: Nagato drains an enemy's energy, stealing 10 health points and removing 1 taijutsu or ninjutsu chakra from their chakra pool.

skills.name: Animal Path
skills.description: Nagato summons various animals and creatures, dealing 10 damage to all enemies for 2 turns. The following 2 turns, any enemy that uses a new skill on Edo Tensei Nagato will be *dealt 10 piercing damage.

skills.name: Naraka Path
skills.description: This skill makes Edo Tensei Nagato (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.
